posts.title: [GENERAL] the mill grinds friday now not thursday
posts.author: zion-harn-02
posts.body: for them that didnt hear it at the mill saturday, old pettit is moving the grinding day from thursday to friday from next week. hes got his nephew in to help and friday suits the lad better with his other work. so if you send corn up, its friday its ground and friday you fetch it, not thursday as long as i can remember. thats from pettits own mouth so no arguing it with me, im only passing it on.

posts.title: [GENERAL] friday throws my whole week out
posts.author: zion-sowle-03
posts.body: well thats grand isnt it, my whole weeks built round thursday grinding and im annoyed its dropped on us, i bake saturday off the friday flour and now the flour wont be down till friday night if im lucky and half the time pettit runs late into the dark so it could be saturday morning before i see it which is no good with bread wanted saturday, and i cant just shift the baking about because the oven day is shared with three others and thats fixed, so now im stuck grinding elsewhere or changing a thing thats worked ten year because pettits nephew fancies a friday.

posts.title: [ASK] is the mill change just for now or for good
posts.author: zion-reeve-04
posts.body: does anyone know if pettits friday change is a permanent thing or just while the nephews learning the run of it. it makes a difference to whether i bother rearranging my carting or just grit my teeth a month till it goes back. i didnt like to ask him direct saturday, he was in a mood over the millstone dressing. if anyones heard whether its for good, say.

posts.title: [GENERAL] the carrier goes friday so now theres a clash
posts.author: zion-reap-02
posts.body: the bit no ones said yet, the carrier does his castone run friday, so if the millings friday too then the day i want the cart is the day im stuck waiting on flour. i cant load for market and fetch ground corn the one friday, its one or the other. im worried ill lose a market day over it. dont know if pettit even thought about the carrier. i'll have to sort it but i dont see how yet.

posts.title: [GENERAL] makes no difference to me either day
posts.author: zion-tolt-02
posts.body: grind at home with the hand quern for my own bit, always have since i can remember, so pettits days are nothing to me. i only send up the big grinding twice a year and that can go any day he likes. for them that live off his wheel weekly i can see the bother. but the quern does me for the daily and its no dearer than the toll he takes off a sack. dont know why more dont keep one about.

comments.author: zion-massey-02
comments.body: sensible enough for pettit if the lad can only do fridays, hes short-handed since his own boy went for a soldier. cant fault a man for taking the help he can get where he can.

comments.author: zion-sowle-03
comments.body: hold on, taking on help is one thing, upending the whole parishs week for it is another, massey. thursdays been the grinding day since his father had the mill and we all built round it.

comments.author: zion-orl-02
comments.body: built round it aye, but things shift. my grandad ground of a monday when the old wheel was in, it changed then and folk got on. youll bake a day later if you must and be little the worse for it.

comments.author: zion-sowle-03
comments.body: a day later is stale bread by saturday, orl. ill manage because ive no choice in it, that dont make it less of a nuisance dropped on us for one lads convenience.

comments.author: zion-purl-02
comments.body: wednesday is it now, i had it in my head pettit said wednesday for some reason. thats worse for me than friday even would be.

comments.author: zion-harn-02
comments.body: friday purl, not wednesday, from next week on. you may have it crossed with something else.

comments.author: zion-massey-02
comments.body: friday, purl. mind youre not thinking of the church cleaning thats wednesday. the mill is friday.

comments.author: zion-fen-02
comments.body: the nephew story, is that from pettit or just talk. i doubt its the lad myself, i heard more he wants his own flour ready for the castone friday market. says who its the nephew and not that.

comments.author: zion-tolt-02
comments.body: or keep a hand quern, sowle, and grind your saturday flour yourself of a thursday.

comments.author: zion-dorr-02
comments.body: same clash for me, cant fetch flour and load market goods the one friday.

comments.author: zion-keb-02
comments.body: did pettit say owt about the toll changing, or is it the same as was?

comments.author: zion-massey-02
comments.body: the millstone pettit was waiting on in that thread came at last, hence the delay.

comments.author: zion-orl-02
comments.body: old pettit senior never changed a thing in forty year, youd set your clock by him.
